name: hsp-py
description: Python language server using ty - an extremely fast type checker by Astral

interface.shortDescription: Python semantic code intelligence through ty
interface.longDescription: Adds ty-backed Python LSP tools to Codex through hsp, with basedpyright as a fallback for operations ty does not implement yet.
defaultPrompt: Use ty LSP to inspect this Python symbol.
Use ty LSP diagnostics on this file.
Use ty LSP to rename this Python symbol.
